data.body:
I agree with Alan that waterfall is still a bad idea.

There are rare cases where you can spec out a whole project and point your pool of agents at it (rebuild this project but in golang?) but mostly: no.

But there's a version of spec-based dev that's more "agile + detailed spec tied to the code"
